title: dussia coriacea
intro: Dussia coriacea, also known as the 'Brazilian Coral Tree', is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. Its bark has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Dussia coriacea are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support wound healing. Herbal preparations of Dussia coriacea include tea and infusions, which can be prepared by steeping the dried bark in hot water.
